title: split-rules-llm output
description: Structured output of the split-rules-llm skill. Consumed by syllago's Add wizard Review step and the CLI's --split=llm code path. Shape is fixed by syllago rules-splitter design doc D9.

name.description: Slug suitable for a library directory name. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens only.

description.description: One-line human-readable title, derived from the original heading.

body.description: Candidate body bytes. Include the heading at the top. LF line endings.

start_line.description: 1-indexed line number where this slice begins (inclusive).

end_line.description: 1-indexed line number where this slice ends (exclusive — one past the last line).
